documents.topic: Rename Executor.Job.Priority (deadline-keyed min-heap) to Executor.Job.Deadline; free the Priority name for a future QoS-bucketed queue.

Push the M3 thread-QoS bracketing implementation from swift-executors (#if canImport(Darwin)) down to L2 (swift-darwin-standard) with L3-unifier (swift-kernel) typealias unification. Preserves the priority-escalation-policy.md DECISION substance; only the layering moves.
Defer richer yield policies (budget, time-slice, predicate) for Executor.Cooperative.runUntil to v2; v1 snapshot-then-check stands per cooperative-donation-contract.md.

Decision NOT to introduce a lock-free MPSC linked-list queue matching the Swift runtime's DefaultActorImpl design. Ecosystem contract is structural-queue + caller-held mutex; runtime's lock-free design is calibrated for libdispatch-pool scale.

narrativeSections.heading: Index Coverage Note
narrativeSections.body: This index currently registers only research authored on or after 2026-04-29. Eleven pre-existing documents in this Research/ directory (e.g., priority-escalation-policy.md, cooperative-donation-contract.md, executor-package-design.md) predate index population and are NOT yet listed here. Per [RES-003c] _index.json MUST be authoritative; backfilling the eleven pre-existing entries is outstanding work.
